title: Prove exact pool and category actuals across corrections
preconditions: Generators create exact transaction, statement-authoritative replacement, refund, reversal, transfer, supersession, category hierarchy/move, pool, instrument, cardholder, and reconciliation histories.
steps: Generate and shrink histories; query all-up, pool, category-direct, category-subtree, and pool-by-category projections before and after assignment corrections, hierarchy moves, and statement reconciliation corrections.
expected: All grouped minor-unit sums equal all-up totals; hierarchy roll-ups never double count; transfers contribute zero spend; refunds follow explicit current dimensions; statement correction replaces rather than duplicates the active effect and never leaves an invalid relationship active; unknown, uncategorized, and unassigned buckets lose no transaction.
